sections.heading: Request Path Parameters
sections.body: This endpoint doesn't use HTTP request path parameters.

sections.heading: Request Query Parameters
sections.body:
The following query parameters are optional:

| Name     | Type    | Necessity | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Default |
| -------- | ------- | --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| pretty   | boolean | Optional  | Flag that indicates whether the response body should be in a prettyprint format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | false   |
| envelope | boolean | Optional  | Flag that indicates whether or not to wrap the response in an envelope.Some API (Application Programming Interface) clients cannot access the HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) response headers or status code. To remediate this, set envelope : true in the query.For endpoints that return a list of results, the content object is an envelope. Atlas adds the status field to the response body. | false   |

sections.heading: Request Body Parameters
sections.body:
All body parameters are required.

| Name  | Type   | Description                                                                                  |
| ----- | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| TOKEN | string | The access token that you want to revoke. To learn more, see Generate Service Account Token. |

sections.heading: Example Request
sections.body:
Replace `{BASE64-AUTH}` in the following example with your base64-encoded service account client ID and secret. To learn more, see [Make an API (Application Programming Interface) Request](example-api-request).

```sh
curl -X POST https://cloud.mongodb.com/api/oauth/revoke \
 -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
 -H "Authorization: Basic {BASE64-AUTH}" \
 -d "token={TOKEN}&token_type_hint=access_token"
```

sections.heading: Response Header
sections.body:
**200:**

200

```http
HTTP/2 200 OK
date: {dateInUnixFormat}
strict-transport-security: max-age=31536000; includeSubdomains;
vary: Accept-Encoding
content-type: application/vnd.atlas.{apiVersion}+json;charset=utf-8
referrer-policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
x-permitted-cross-domain-policies: none
x-content-type-options: nosniff
x-mongodb-service-version: gitHash={gitHash}; versionString={applicationVersion}
x-frame-options: DENY
content-length: {requestLengthInBytes}
x-envoy-upstream-service-time: 44
server: mdbws
```

**400:**

400

```http
HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request
Date: {dateInUnixFormat}
Content-Type: application/json
Content-Length: {requestLengthInBytes}
Server: mdbws
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubdomains;
X-MongoDB-Service-Version: gitHash={gitHash}; versionString={ApplicationVersion}
...
```

**401:**

401

```http
HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized
Content-Type: application/json;charset=ISO-8859-1
Date: {dateInUnixFormat}
WWW-Authenticate: Digest realm="MMS Public API", domain="", nonce="{nonce}", algorithm=MD5, op="auth", stale=false
Content-Length: {requestLengthInBytes}
Connection: keep-alive
```

**403:**

403

```http
HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden
Vary: Accept-Encoding
Content-Type: application/json
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=300
Date: {dateInUnixFormat}
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Length: {requestLengthInBytes}
X-MongoDB-Service-Version: gitHash={gitHash}; versionString={ApplicationVersion}
...
```

**429:**

429

```http
HTTP/1.1 429 Too Many Requests
Retry-After: {retryAfterValue}
Vary: Accept-Encoding
Content-Type: application/json
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=300
Date: {dateInUnixFormat}
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Length: {requestLengthInBytes}
X-MongoDB-Service-Version: gitHash={gitHash}; versionString={ApplicationVersion}
...
```

**500:**

500

```http
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
Vary: Accept-Encoding
Content-Type: application/json
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=300
Date: {dateInUnixFormat}
Content-Length: {requestLengthInBytes}
X-MongoDB-Service-Version: gitHash={gitHash}; versionString={ApplicationVersion}
...
```

**503:**

503

```http
HTTP/1.1 503 Service Unavailable
Retry-After: {retryAfterValue}
Vary: Accept-Encoding
Content-Type: application/json
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=300
Date: {dateInUnixFormat}
Content-Length: {requestLengthInBytes}
X-MongoDB-Service-Version: gitHash={gitHash}; versionString={ApplicationVersion}
...
```

sections.heading: Response Body
sections.body:
**200:**

200

This endpoint doesn't return a response body.

**400:**

400

```http
{
  "error_description": "The provided credentials are not valid.",
  "error": "invalid_request"
}
```

```http
{
  "error_description": "Invalid grant type.",
  "error": "unsupported_grant_type"
}
```

```http
{
  "error_description": "Invalid grant.",
  "error": "invalid_grant"
}
```

**401:**

401

```http
{
  "error_description": "Invalid credentials provided.",
  "error": "invalid_client"
}
```

**403:**

403

```http
{
  "error_description": "IP access list validation failed for the service account.",
  "error": "access_denied"
}
```

**429:**

429

```http
{
  "error_description": "Resource {URL} is limited to 10 requests every 1 minutes.",
  "error": "rate_limited"
}
```

**500:**

500

```http
{
  "error_description": "Unexpected error.",
  "error": "server_error"
}
```
